/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/icu4c@77/lib CMakeFiles/schedule_test.dir/src/test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_test.dir/src/Database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_test.dir/src/ScheduleManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_test.dir/src/models/Asset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_test.dir/src/models/Schedule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_test.dir/src/models/Interrupt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_test.dir/src/models/TimeSlot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_test.dir/src/models/PlayItem.cpp.o -o schedule_test  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd
